response: Hey everyone, I'm Gray. I tend to be pretty methodical and cooperative, so I like to listen carefully to others before making decisions. Looking forward to working with you all to figure things out.

Hey everyone, Indigo here! I'm pretty outgoing and I like to keep things moving—no patience for people who drag their feet. When it comes to group decisions, I trust my gut and I'll speak my mind, so don't expect me to sit quietly in the corner.

Hey everyone, I'm Bailey! I'm pretty outgoing and love diving into creative discussions, but I also pay close attention to details—so expect me to be all in on the conversation and not afraid to call out anything that seems off. Let's get this party started and figure out who's really on our side!

Hey everyone, Alex here! I'm super outgoing and I like to keep the energy high—no point in wasting time when we've got a mystery to solve. I trust my instincts and I'm not afraid to shake things up if someone's acting shady, so let's get to the bottom of this!

Hey everyone, I'm Dana. I'm pretty methodical and like to take a step back to assess things before jumping to conclusions—so don't expect me to rush into any decisions without solid reasoning. Looking forward to working through this together.

Hey everyone, I'm Harper. I tend to be pretty careful and like to think things through before speaking up, but I'm always happy to work together with the group. I believe listening to everyone is the best way to find the truth.
Hey everyone, I'm Kennedy. I'm pretty reserved and tend to overthink things, so I like to observe before jumping in. I'll speak up when I'm sure something's off, but I need time to process first.

1. Gray seems methodical and cooperative—could be dangerous if they start connecting dots and rallying the group.
2. Harper is cautious and listens carefully, which fits a Doctor's playstyle of protecting quietly.
3. Killing Gray early removes a potential leader who could organize the innocents against us.

ACTION: Kill Gray

night_result: Gray was killed by the Mafia.

response:

That kind of enthusiasm can be a great cover for Mafia trying to look innocent. Dana, Harper, and Kennedy all seemed more cautious and analytical, which feels less like a play to me.

But here's what's sticking with me: Bailey said they pay close attention to details and will call out anything off—well, I haven't seen that follow-through yet. I'm keeping an eye on Bailey and Alex for now.

For now, I'm not convinced of anyone, but I'm keeping eyes on Indigo for that early push.

I'm keeping my eyes on Indigo for making a bold early accusation, and on Harper and Kennedy for staying quiet—could be cautious civilians, or could be Mafia lying low. Let's hear what they have to say before I lock in a vote.
